news.t: Day Hagan/Ned Davis Research Smart Sector® Fixed Income ETF Launched on NYSE

overview.description: The Day Hagan / Ned Davis Research Smart Sector Fixed Income ETF (SSFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that uses a proprietary model to allocate exposure to fixed income sectors. SSFI was launched on Sep 29, 2021 and is issued by Day Hagan.

data.title: Day Hagan/Ned Davis Research Smart Sector® Fixed Income ETF Launched on NYSE
data.text: SARASOTA, Fla., Oct. 6, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- The Day Hagan/Ned Davis Research Smart Sector® Fixed Income ETF (NYSE: SSFI) began trading on the New York Stock Exchange on September 29, 2021.
